evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the fill-rate based pricing requirement.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the fill-rate based pricing requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or data related to this specific pricing model. While there are successful steps related to bookings, none of them demonstrate the pricing adjustments based on fill-rate as specified in the requirement. This lack of concrete evidence indicates that the validation cannot be conclusively performed at this time.
gaps: No evidence of fill-rate based pricing implementation or validation.
